entity_types.name: CasualPlayer
entity_types.description: Players who prioritize relaxation and low-stakes gameplay experience.

attributes.name: player_level
attributes.description: The current skill level or experience of thethought_process: The user wants a knowledge graph ontolo

entity_types.name: HardcorePlayer
entity_types.description: Highly skilled players focused on high-risk, high-reward gameplay.

attributes.name: skill_rating
attributes.description: The competitive skill level of the player.

entity_types.name: LootPlayer
entity_types.description: Players primarily motivated by progression, rare items and looting mechanics.

entity_types.name: PvPplayer
entity_types.description: Players focused on competitive player-vs-player combat.

attributes.name: focus_area
attributes.description: The primary area of interest in combat.

entity_types.name: ContentCreator
entity_types.description: Influencers who create video content about the game.

attributes.name: platform_id
attributes.description: The social media platform where they are active.

entity_types.name: GameDeveloper
entity_types.description: The team or studio responsible for creating and updating the game.

attributes.name: studio_role
attributes.description: The specific role within the development studio.

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organizations or specialized gaming media reporting on the game.

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: The type of media (e.g., news, blog).

entity_types.name: SocialMediaPlatform
entity_types.description: The digital platforms where the community discusses the game.

attributes.name: platform_type
attributes.description: The type of digital platform (e.g., forum, video).

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual person who is not covered by specific types above.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization or group that is not covered by specific types above.

edge_types.name: PLAYS
edge_types.description: A player engaging with the game content.

edge_types.name: CREATES_CONTENT
edge_types.description: A content creator producing media about the game.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: A media outlet reporting on the game's update.

edge_types.name: DISCUSSES_ON
edge_types.description: A player or creator discussing the game on a platform.

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: A player group supporting the update.

edge_types.name: OPPOSES
edge_types.description: A player group opposing the update.

edge_types.name: REPRESENTS
edge_types.description: A player group representing a specific interest.

edge_types.name: COMPETES_WITH
edge_types.description: A competitive relationship between players or groups.

edge_types.name: REACTION_TO
edge_types.description: A player or creator reacting to the update event.
